description: Documentation/glossary hygiene gaps: legal-glossary.yaml Art 31 entry disagreed with OSHA-KR-Training.yaml's topic mapping; 6 statutes (생명윤리법, EU GDP, EU GVP, 독성시험 책임자 규정, 소방기본법, 응급의료에 관한 법률) cited across workflows but not indexed in the glossary; all 10 GMP schemas omitted the workflow_type field present in sibling pharma domains; glp/study-protocol cited bare '약사법' with no article; equipment-inspection/permit-to-work/safety-patrol schema legal_basis strings did not match their own README's stated basis.
